visual_description: A man in a dark suit and white gloves rides a bicycle on a curved road, leaning forward as he pedals. Two white Jeeps follow closely behind him, approaching from the right side of the road. The scene is set on a sunny day with mountains and trees visible in the background, and the man’s gaze is directed ahead as he rides.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice singing in a neutral tone, with a moderate pitch and pace, accompanied by background music.
